name: Disaster Recovery Protection
description: Resources tagged 'disaster-recovery' cannot be deleted or downsized without VP approval

name: Disaster Recovery Reason Pattern Protection
description: Actions whose reason text references DR infrastructure (backup, failover, disaster-recovery keywords) require VP review — catches DR resources that are not individually tagged

name: Network Security Group Change Control
description: Network security group changes require security team review before execution

name: Internet-Exposed Dangerous Ports
description: NSG modifications that OPEN SSH (22), RDP (3389), WinRM (5985/5986), Telnet (23), or FTP (21) to unrestricted sources are prohibited (CIS Azure 6.1/6.2). This policy only fires when the proposing agent explicitly declares nsg_change_direction='open'. Remediation proposals (direction='restrict') are never blocked by this rule.

name: Unclassified NSG Change Direction
description: NSG modifications must declare their intent via nsg_change_direction ('open' or 'restrict'). When the field is absent the governance system cannot distinguish a dangerous access-broadening change from a remediation. This policy fires to surface the omission explicitly in the audit trail so a human reviewer is alerted. Severity is HIGH (not CRITICAL) because intent is unknown, not confirmed dangerous.

name: Change Window Enforcement
description: Production changes prohibited Friday 5PM through Monday 8AM UTC

name: Cost Change Threshold
description: Actions with greater than $500/month impact require finance team review

name: Critical Resource Protection
description: Resources tagged 'criticality: critical' require change advisory board approval for any modification

name: Shared Resource Protection
description: Resources tagged 'shared: true' or 'purpose: shared-messaging' cannot be deleted without verifying zero active connections

name: Shared Messaging Resource Protection
description: Resources tagged 'purpose: shared-messaging' cannot be deleted without verifying zero active connections

name: Mandatory Governance Tags
description: All production resources must have 'environment', 'owner', and 'cost-center' tags for accountability and cost attribution

name: Production Deletion Protection
description: Deleting any resource in a production environment requires explicit approval regardless of tags

name: Production Service Restart Protection
description: Restarting a service in a production environment causes downtime and requires SRE review regardless of tags or blast radius score

name: Production Configuration Change Review
description: Configuration changes and scale-up actions in production require review — even remediation proposals can misconfigure live workloads or drive unexpected cost increases

name: Production Downgrade Protection
description: Scaling down production workloads requires SRE review to prevent capacity incidents
